title: dioscorea formosana
intro: Dioscorea formosana, also known as the Taiwan yam, is a type of plant that belongs to the Dioscoreaceae family and is native to Taiwan. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to stimulate the adrenal glands and increase the production of cortisol, a hormone that helps the body respond to stress. The health benefits of Dioscorea formosana include its potential to improve athletic performance, reduce fatigue, and alleviate symptoms of menopause and thyroid disorders. Dioscorea formosana can be prepared for medicinal use in various herbal preparations, such as capsules, tablets, and teas, which are often used to support adrenal function and overall well-being.
